summary: Phase C+D features testing completed. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: Dashboard 5 KPIs + Calendar widget + Alert bell with count badge, Sales Dashboard Top Performers panel with market dropdown, Market Comparison date coverage badge, Allocation Tool Accumulation Forecast (1mo/3mo/6mo/1yr), Scale Planner Market Days/Week slider with Schedule Impact panel, Alerts page dismiss functionality, Manual page with updated sections.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase C+D features implemented correctly
Calendar events CRUD working with proper authentication
Alert dismiss functionality persists dismissed IDs in database
Sales top items endpoint returns ranked products with top3/bottom/needs_push categorization
Market comparison includes first_session_date for date coverage display
Scale Planner has flexible market days/week slider with schedule impact calculations
seed_data_creation: Created test calendar event (TEST_UI_Event) during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C+D features verified. Key features: (1) Dashboard has 5 KPIs + Calendar widget + Alert bell with count badge in top-right. (2) Sales Dashboard has Top Performers panel with market dropdown (data-testid=market-top-filter), showing Top 3 Items, Needs Promotion, and Lowest Performer sections. (3) Market Comparison shows date coverage badge (data-testid=date-coverage). (4) Allocation Tool has Accumulation Forecast section with 1 Month, 3 Months, 6 Months, 1 Year projections. (5) Scale Planner has Market Days/Week slider and Schedule Impact panel showing 2-5 days/week options. (6) Alerts page has dismiss buttons (data-testid=dismiss-alert-*) with confirmation. (7) Manual page updated with Market Mode, Calendar, Alerts sections. All backend endpoints working: /api/calendar/events (CRUD), /api/alerts/{id}/dismiss, /api/alerts/dismissed, /api/dashboard/sales-top-items.
